name: lockpaw
title: Lockpaw
description: Guard your Mac screen with a hotkey while AI agents keep running. Touch ID to unlock.
author: eriknielsen

commands.name: lock
commands.title: Guard Screen
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Let the watchdog guard your screen while agents work

commands.name: unlock
commands.title: Call off Guard
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Unlock with Touch ID — the watchdog stands down

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Guard
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Toggle the watchdog on or off
